summary.intent: Fix a Rust compiler warning about an unused variable `req_session_id` in the gateway service after refactoring browser session logging to use an ActionHook.
summary.outcome: Removed the unused `req_session_id` variable from services.rs, committed, and pushed the fix.

repo: Browser session logging was refactored to use an ActionHook on BrowserManager, which unified logging for both tool (agent) and service (UI) code paths.
Agent browser sessions are visible in Settings > Browser history after this change.

code.finding: `req_session_id` was originally used for logging new sessions only, but became unused after ActionHook took over all session logging. Removed the variable.

workflow: Compiler warnings (unused variables) surfaced as a natural follow-up cleanup after a refactor shifted responsibilities to a hook.

friction: Unused variable warning introduced by the prior refactor required a separate cleanup commit.
